parameters.query:
={{ `WITH input AS (
  SELECT
    NULLIF('${String($json.mushroomprocess_product_id ?? '').replace(/'/g, "''")}', '') AS product_id,
    NULLIF('${String($json.storage_location ?? '').replace(/'/g, "''")}', '') AS storage_location
), target_location AS (
  SELECT l.nocopk, l.name
  FROM public.locations l, input i
  WHERE lower(l.name) = lower(i.storage_location)
  ORDER BY l.nocopk
  LIMIT 1
), target_product AS (
  SELECT p.nocopk
  FROM public.products p, input i
  WHERE p.product_id = i.product_id
  LIMIT 1
), upd AS (
  UPDATE public.products p
  SET storage_location_id = target_location.nocopk,
      nc_updated_at = now()
  FROM target_location, target_product
  WHERE p.nocopk = target_product.nocopk
  RETURNING p.*
)
SELECT
  true AS ok,
  COALESCE(upd.airtable_id, upd.nocopk::text) AS updated_product_record_id,
  upd.product_id AS mushroomprocess_product_id,
  target_location.name AS storage_location
FROM upd
CROSS JOIN target_location;` }}

={{ `INSERT INTO public.audit_log(actor, action, entity_type, entity_id, details)
VALUES (
  'n8n',
  'product.unshipped',
  'product',
  '${String($('PGSQL - Mark Product UnShipped').first().json.mushroomprocess_product_id || $('PGSQL - Mark Product UnShipped').first().json.updated_product_record_id || 'unknown').replace(/'/g, "''")}',
  jsonb_build_object(
    'product_id', '${String($('PGSQL - Mark Product UnShipped').first().json.mushroomprocess_product_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''")}',
    'record_id', '${String($('PGSQL - Mark Product UnShipped').first().json.updated_product_record_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''")}',
    'storage_location', '${String($('PGSQL - Mark Product UnShipped').first().json.storage_location || '').replace(/'/g, "''")}',
    'source', 'signaturegate_pgsql_workflow'
  )
)
RETURNING audit_log_id;` }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, updated_product_record_id: $('PGSQL - Mark Product UnShipped').first().json.updated_product_record_id, mushroomprocess_product_id: $('PGSQL - Mark Product UnShipped').first().json.mushroomprocess_product_id, storage_location: $('PGSQL - Mark Product UnShipped').first().json.storage_location } }}
